title: I am rewriting my sleep story
subtitle: A single-line affirmation for claiming authorship of the new identity.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 11 of the SLEEP program. One sentence that shifts the framing from being a bad sleeper to being a person actively rewriting their relationship with sleep.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 11 of SLEEP: A 30-Day Tapping Intensive to Fall Asleep Faster and Wake Energised (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798269649795).

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 11 of the SLEEP program. The sentence does two things: it acknowledges that the old story exists, and it claims the pen.
I am rewriting my sleep story.

Say it out loud three times in the morning, hand on heart. Say it once more after any night that feeds the old story. You are not claiming to be fixed. You are claiming to be the one doing the rewriting.
Adapted from Day 11 of SLEEP: A 30-Day Tapping Intensive to Fall Asleep Faster and Wake Energised (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
